item.title: Hitachi SR-604 AM/FM Stereo Receiver - $160 (Cranston)
item.description: Gorgeous Hitachi SR-604 AM/FM stereo receiver in fantastic condition, works perfectly and sounds fantastic. From 1979 and very beautiful. 35 watts per channel. Has phono input for your turntable. Class G amplifier. I can demo it in my garage. Awesome receiver for $160 firm.

item.title: Sherwood S-2750CP AM/FM Stereo Receiver - $49 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice, compact Sherwood S-2750CP stereo receiver in great condition. Works perfectly and sounds fantastic. 55 watts per channel. Can run 2 sets of speakers. Has phono input for your turntable. Built in equalizer. I can demo it for you in my garage. Great deal for $49 firm.

item.title: Kenwood Vintage KR-3030 Stereo Receiver - $200 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage Kenwood KR-3030 Stereo Receiver Made

item.title: Pioneer Vintage SX-727 Stereo Receiver - $500 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage (1972-1974) Pioneer Stereo Receiver

item.title: Stereo receiver - Pyle PT 390AU - $150 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: new. still in original box. used only once.

item.title: Audio stereo Yamaha Receiver & Polk audio speakers - $160 (Warwick)
item.description: Big Yamaha receiver and Polk audio speakers and powered sub with center channel speaker, everything is in very good condition.

item.title: Pioneer SX-6 System - $250 (Warwick)
item.description: Complete package

item.title: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player - $80 (Cranston)
item.description: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player

item.title: Vintage JVC Turntable - $175 (Dartmouth)
item.description: I am selling this 1970s JVC model VL-5 turntable that has not been used for many years. Any questions text or call 508-287-969

item.title: Pristine Klipsch KG4 Stereo Speakers - $549 (Cranston)
item.description: Super beautiful pair of Klipsch KG 4 speakers. I got them from the original owner. Made in 1988. These are classics that are very efficient and sound fantastic. Getting harder to find for a good price. Cabinets and grills are outstanding and the drivers all work perfectly. See pics for condition. I have them hooked up in my basement for demonstration. Great pair of speakers for $549 firm.

item.title: KEF Coda 7 Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $85 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice pair of KEF Coda 7 bookshelf speakers. Very good condition and sound amazing for their size. Handle 70 watts per channel. Efficient at 91dB at 1 watt/meter so easy to drive with any amplifier or receiver. I can demo them in my garage. Great little speakers for $85 firm.

item.title: Onkyo rack system - $220 (Tiverton)
item.description: Audio Video Control amplifier, AM/FM receiver, 6 disc CD changer,

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: NAD 50 Watt per Channel AM/FM CD Receiver with Remote - $50 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful NAD L53 Receiver that plays CDs and has AM/FM tuner. It also plays DVDs but has no HDMI out so only hooks up to older TVs. Works great for music. 50 watts per channel and sounds great. Remote control, AM antenna and owners manual included. Works perfectly. I can demonstrate it in my garage. Cool unit for $50 firm.

item.title: Sansui D-X311WR Auto-Reverse Dual Cassette Deck - $40 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice Sansui D-X311WR auto-reverse dual cassette deck. Has Dolby B&C noise reduction and an MPX filter. Very nice condition. Works and is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Cool blast from the past for $40 firm.

item.title: Sony SS-H3300 Stereo Speakers - $49 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful pair of Sony SS-H3300 stereo speakers in excellent condition and sound fantastic. 3 way speakers with 5" woofer, 1" tweeter and 13/16" super tweeter. I have them hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Great speakers for $49 firm.

item.title: Onkyo TX-RZ830 9.2 Channel Home Theater Receiver - Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, C - $450 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Onkyo TX-RZ830 receiver. 9.2 channels at 120 watts per channel! 2 zones so you can play the same or different program material in another room. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth and Chromecast built in. Has phono input for your turntable. Has all the bells and whistles! Excellent condition with hardly any use. Power cord, FM antenna and remote control included. Sounds amazing. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Was $1299 new a few years ago. Great deal at $450 firm.

item.title: Vintage Magnavox Micromatic Suitcase Stereo Record Player - $20 (Cranston)
item.description: Cool old Magnavox Micromatic solid state record player. Excellent cosmetic condition but needs work. Selling as a project. Super cool looking unit for $20 firm.

item.title: I Buy Vintage Stereo Equipment - Receivers, Speakers Etc... - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: I like to buy, tinker with and collect vintage stereo equipment. I like old receivers, speakers, turntables, tape decks, cd players etc... I'll even buy some broken stuff (depending what it is). Let me know what you have and where it is located. You can email me through craigslist or call or text the phone number that comes up when you click "reply" at the top left corner of my ad. Thanks, Bill

item.title: Magnepan MG 1.6/QR Planar Stereo Speakers - $599 (Cranston)
item.description: Super cool pair of Magnepan Magneplanar loudspeakers, model MG 1.6/QR. Cherry trim. These were reviewed as the best sounding $1500 pair of speakers you could buy when they came out in 1998. They sound simply amazing. Very good condition. Owners manual and original box included. I can demonstrate them in my garage. $599 firm is a great deal.

item.title: Sherwood RA-1145R stereo - $50 (Warwick)
item.description: Sherwood RA-1145R amp receiver

item.title: Emotiva BASX PT-100 preamp stereo audophile sound system - $300 (Providence)
item.description: Great little audiophile quality pre-amp. USB interface for powered desktop speakers or powered stereo system. Specs can be found online, perfect condition unit includes original box, manual, packaging, dust cover, original remote, and cables.

item.description: 4 corner speakers, center speaker, sub woofer speaker. Sony amp receiver. Sony Dual cassette deck. Harmon Kardon CD burner. 200' speaker wire. Has been a fantastic system but thinking about upgrading. Only serious inquiries need to reply. Please email for original receipts more than 2300.00, manuals, pics and all paperwork. item.title: Sony Multi Channel AV receiver - $300 (Woonsocket)
item.description: It's barely used and is two years old. It comes with a remote and a wire. It's a very heavy.

item.title: Denon Receiver - $200
item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: Korg 4 Track Analog Cassette Recorder - $125 (Warren, ri)
item.description: Barely used analog cassette recorder with manual and original packing.

item.title: NAD 7255PE AM/FM Stereo Integrated Amplfier - $125 (Cranston)
item.description: The NAD 7225PE is an integrated amplifier with AM/FM stereo tuner introduced in 1988. Features 25 W per channel, two sets of speaker outputs, built-in phono preamp for a turnable connection. Output was measured to be ~32 - 36W per channel and sounds great!

item.title: Gemini TT-900WW bluetooth turntable - $75 (Johnston)
item.description: Gemini TT-900WW Modern Bluetooth Turntable System.

item.description: Victrola 6-in-1 Turntable, a multimedia center designed to play various audio formats with a vintage aesthetic

item.title: Turntable to transfer vinyl to USB price reduced - $30 (Tiverton)
item.description: Brand new with built in speakers

item.title: Rotel RB-1050 stereo power amplifier - $150 (Northkingstown)
item.description: Selling a Rotel RB-1050 stereo power amplifier for $150. This is a well-regarded, high-quality amp known for delivering clean, dynamic sound. Ideal for an audiophile setup or home theater system.

item.title: Complete Stereo System - $225 (Middletown)
item.description: ONKYO TX SR501/AV Stereo Receiver, ONKYO TA RW344 Stereo Tape Deck, PANASONIC Compact Disk Changer, pair of POLK AUDIO Model S6 Woodgrain Speakers (10"W x 21"H). Includes owner's manuals and remote controls. Excellent Condition

item.title: Vtg 80's Ghetto Blaster Boom Box GE Dual Cassette Radio - $50 (Johnston)
item.description: 1 year ago I took the front cover off to try to fix the cassette players. Belts were missing, deteriorated. I bought new ones, but lost interest in putting this back to working condition. So here it is, with the cover open, with new belts in baggie waiting to be installed.I dont have time to figure it out. None of the electronics are un-soldered, just un screwed plastics.. Its just taken apart where the screws were. Vintage 80's Radio and equalizer all work fine.

item.title: Magnavox concert grand - $900 (Barrington)
item.description: 1959 Magnavox concert grand. This was electronically restored before I bought it six years ago. Sounds absolutely incredible. The turntable will need some work. Currently stuck on one speed and manual.

item.title: Kenwood AM-FM Radio Receiver KR-A4040 - $75 (Westerly)
item.description: Vintage - one owner

item.title: KLH-9912 Stereo Speaker Pair - $40 (North Scituate)
item.description: KLH-9912 Stereo Speaker Pair 8 Ohms 250 Watts Per Channel. Floor speaks. Cases scratched and a few dents, one front screen missing. However they still work great! $40 obo

item.title: Sony AV Receiver - $50 (North Scituate)
item.description: Sony AV Receiver STR-K7000. Good working condition. Original remote. $50 obo

item.title: Wireless Speaker Kit - $25 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Experience high-quality audio with the RocketFish RF-WHTIB-A Wireless Rear Speaker Kit. It enables a wireless (not to be confused with WiFi) connection from a stereo receiver or TV, etc. to a set of speakers. Perfect for those situations in which wired connections are not possible.

item.title: Sony STR-DE185 Stereo Receiver - $30 (Exeter)
item.description: Good working receiver with remote control. Rated 100x2. Clean unit, but does have some scratches. Nice 2-channel unit.

item.title: KEF PSW2150 Subwoofer & HTS2001 Satellite Speakers - $199 (Cranston)
item.description: Awesome KEF PSW2150 10" subwoofer and 10 KEF HTS2001 satellite speakers. Not all satellites have the stands. Only 5 pictured but I have 10. The satellites are known for their crisp, clear sound and excellent vocals. Subwoofer is nice and powerful. This is a great sounding set up for stereo and surround sound. very good condition. $199 for everything is a great deal.

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $15,500 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller.

item.description: 2015 Grand Design Reflection 293RES 5th wheel, 3-slide RV with serious amounts of storage throughout.

item.title: Yamaha HTR-5540 Surround Receiver - $35 (Exeter)
item.description: Good working, clean Yamaha 5-channel receiver. Comes with the original remote (not shown but included). Sounds good and looks good.

item.description: one of a kind Korg digital mixer with 2 xlr and 6 1/4" inputs, plus 2 lightpipe (toslink) in/out connections ( 8 channel ) providing 16in 16out over digital, stereo out for mains, stereo out for aux monitor plus headphone out

item.description: Huge yard sale... something for everyone... clothes, knick knacks, collectibles, fire trucks, baseball cards, hats, stereo equipment and speakers, tools, dungeons and Dragons, vintage toys, video games, consoles... and sooo much more!!! Penbry Ave in smithfield... come on by. Ask if you don't see something you're looking for as not everything is out.

It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.

item.title: CHARLESTOWN RI HUGE-SAT 8/2 & SUN 8/3 9-3 (Charlestown)
item.description: Huge yard sale in in Charlestown near the town hall Saturday, August 2 and Sunday, August 3 starts 9AM to 3PM. we have 50 years of accumulation, antiques collectibles, unusual items, kitchen and household items. No items for children no early birds. with: 12 or more antique stained glass windows, large parrot cage, Allagash canoe, smoker, vintage post office boxes, antique humidor, antique print trays, Small unusual corner shaped white sink, lots of tools, round pedestal oak dining room table, folding poker card table, lots of lamps, tables, antique birdcages, old stereos and speakers, chairs- wood rocking and other kinds, pictures and frames, toolboxes, antique wooden drying racks, antique scales, Dodge ram van rims, 2 sets of Buick wheel covers from a 1984 Park Ave. a wire set and a regular set, crocks, ab lounger exerciser, even the kitchen sink and Santa Claus

item.description: (2) Like-New Shure ULXD4Q digital wireless receivers with (2) Shure SM58 wireless microphones. Used lightly in an auditorium space, no road use/wear. All powers on, includes surge protector.
